summary: iter211 testing complete: All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Real Claude vision integration verified with LIVE VISION mode returning items. Mobile waste tab working with file upload. EchoViewerDrawer SidePanel migration verified. EchoChatBubble regression passed.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data and generated test images programmatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter211 features fully tested: (1) GET /api/waste/feature-flags returns 9+ flags including feature.vision_llm=true; (2) Real vision via Claude Sonnet 4.5 working - POST /api/waste/capture/still with media_base64 returns vision_mode='llm' and items with source='vision_llm:claude'; (3) Fallback to stub when no media_base64; (4) Idempotency via client_id and Idempotency-Key header both working; (5) trace_id propagation verified; (6) Mobile /m/staff/{token} waste tab working with file picker (capture='environment'), shows LIVE VISION indicator and waste items; (7) EchoViewerDrawer migrated to SidePanel - testId forwarding works (echo-viewer-drawer, echo-viewer-drawer-close, viewer-summary-strip, 8 viewer sections); (8) EchoChatBubble regression passed - opens chat panel with quick actions.

backend_tests_summary.TestRealVision: PASSED - vision_mode='llm' with items having source='vision_llm:claude', confidence > 0.5
backend_tests_summary.TestIdempotency: PASSED - Same client_id/Idempotency-Key returns same entry_id with idempotent_replay=true
backend_tests_summary.TestEchoChatRegression: PASSED - fix Elroy returns remediate_broken_lifecycle, CCP status, ticket status all work
backend_tests_summary.TestWasteEndpointsRegression: PASSED - entries list, item patch, daily digest all work
backend_tests_summary.TestOtherEndpointsRegression: PASSED - CRM forecast, lifecycle audit, tenant config, chat sessions all work

frontend_tests_summary.MobileWasteTab: PASSED - Staff mobile root loads, waste tab button visible, file input with capture='environment' and accept='image/*', file upload triggers LIVE VISION analysis, shows entry_id, vision_mode indicator, dollar total, and waste items
frontend_tests_summary.EchoViewerDrawer: PASSED - Opens via custom event, testId forwarding works (echo-viewer-drawer), viewer-summary-strip visible, 8 viewer sections found, close button works
frontend_tests_summary.EchoChatBubble: PASSED - Chat bubble visible in EchoEvents panel, opens chat panel with NEW SESSION, shows quick actions (CCP status, What happened with Elroy?, Ticket status)
